cards.title: YouTube Tightens Monetization Rules on AI Slop
cards.body: YouTube updated its monetization policies to clearly define AI-generated and low-quality videos ineligible for ad revenue. The move aims to maintain content quality standards across the platform.

cards.title: Jensen Huang Seals Major Deals in Japan
cards.body: NVIDIA's CEO left Tokyo with agreements spanning Japan's entire tech ecosystem. The visit signals major expansion plans for the region.

cards.title: Apple Lawsuit Threatens OpenAI Hardware Plans
cards.body: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging misconduct involving over 400 former Apple employees. The lawsuit could complicate OpenAI's hardware ambitions and IPO timeline.

cards.title: Christopher Nolan Warns AI Is Trojan Horse
cards.body: The filmmaker called AI an obvious "Trojan horse" technology with hidden implications. His comments reflect growing concern about AI's cultural impact.

cards.title: Current AI Builds Inclusive World Wide Web of AI
cards.body: The nonprofit is creating culturally inclusive AI accessible to all, making progress across devices and conversational AI. The initiative aims to prevent any culture from being left behind.

cards.title: Moonshot AI Releases New Kimi Model Version
cards.body: Chinese company Moonshot AI launched a new version of its Kimi model this week. The release sparked discussions about competitive AI development globally.

cards.title: VC Predicts AI Wealth Must Be Redistributed
cards.body: Index Ventures co-founder Neil Rimer believes Silicon Valley's AI-generated wealth will need redistribution. He suggests this could happen voluntarily or through other means.

cards.title: Vertu's $6,880 AI Agent Phone Reviewed
cards.body: Vertu launched a luxury foldable phone with an AI agent priced at $6,880. The device combines premium hardware with AI capabilities for executives.

cards.title: Databricks Reaches $188B Valuation Milestone
cards.body: Databricks hit a $188 billion valuation, cementing its position as AI's favorite comeback story. The company published research on cost savings from open-weight AI models.

cards.title: Zoom Meeting Transcription Raises Privacy Concerns
cards.body: Recording and transcribing every meeting creates information overload with unclear ownership. The trend raises questions about privacy and practical utility.

cards.title: Agility Robotics Opens Fremont Training Center
cards.body: Agility is launching a new training facility for its Digit robots in Fremont, California. The move directly challenges Tesla's robotics dominance.

cards.title: AI Boom Reshapes India's Smartphone Market
cards.body: India's smartphone slowdown reflects how AI is transforming consumer electronics pricing and demand. Corporate strategy shifts are reshaping the entire market landscape.

cards.title: Apple Lawsuit Could Derail OpenAI IPO Plans
cards.body: Apple's trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI alleges misconduct reaching executive levels. The legal challenge arrives at a critical moment for OpenAI's public ambitions.

cards.title: Patreon Actively Blocks AI Scraping Bots
cards.body: Patreon partnered with Cloudflare to actively block bots training AI on creator content without permission. The move escalates protection beyond passive robots.txt blocks.

cards.title: First GPU Financiers Move Into Inference Chips
cards.body: A $400 million chip-backed loan signals the next wave of AI infrastructure investment. The deal marks a strategic shift toward inference-focused hardware.

cards.title: Google Vids Adds AI Avatar Feature
cards.body: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids for users to star in their own videos. The feature integrates Gemini Omni-powered generation and editing tools.

cards.title: Roblox Launches AI Game Creation Tool
cards.body: Roblox released a "Build" feature enabling users to generate basic games from text prompts. The mobile app feature democratizes game creation on the platform.

cards.title: Google AI Mode Integrates Third-Party App Control
cards.body: Google expanded AI Mode to complete tasks across selected apps beyond answering questions. The update enables deeper integration with user workflows.

cards.title: YouTube Tightens Policies on AI-Generated Content
cards.body: YouTube updated monetization policies to clearly define AI-generated and low-quality videos that can't earn ad revenue. The move aims to combat 'AI slop' flooding the platform.

cards.title: Can Apple's Lawsuit Derail OpenAI's Hardware Plans?
cards.body: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging misconduct and claiming 400+ former Apple employees now work there. The timing could complicate OpenAI's IPO and hardware ambitions.

cards.title: Nonprofit Current AI Builds Inclusive World Web
cards.body: Current AI is developing AI accessible across cultures and devices, positioned as a democratic alternative. The nonprofit made significant progress in AI chat and device integration.

cards.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi Model Sparks Competition Concerns
cards.body: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new Kimi model version, raising concerns about competitive AI development. The release prompted debate about global AI power dynamics.

cards.title: Databricks Hits $188B Valuation as AI Powerhouse
cards.body: Databricks cemented its position as a leading AI infrastructure company, publishing research on cost savings from open-weight models. The valuation reflects investor confidence in AI's second wave.

cards.title: Patreon Blocks AI Scraping with Cloudflare
cards.body: Patreon shifted from passive robots.txt to active bot-blocking measures in partnership with Cloudflare. The move protects creator content from unauthorized AI model training.

cards.title: Google Vids Adds AI Avatar Generation Features
cards.body: Google's video tool now lets users create videos starring digital versions of themselves using Gemini Omni. The feature enables AI-powered video generation and editing from prompts.

cards.title: Roblox Launches Text-to-Game AI Creator Tool
cards.body: Roblox's new 'Build' feature lets users generate basic games with a single text prompt. The tool democratizes game creation using AI capabilities.

cards.title: Google AI Mode Expands to Task Automation
cards.body: Google's AI Mode now links and interacts with select apps beyond answering questions. Users can complete tasks across their regularly-used applications.

cards.title: AI Shows Higher Hiring Bias Than Humans
cards.body: New research reveals AI language models develop their own biases when screening resumes, beyond biases learned from training data. The findings raise concerns about AI in hiring decisions.

cards.title: OpenAI's GPT-Red Super-Hacker Boosts Security
cards.body: OpenAI built GPT-Red, an LLM designed to attack its own models and strengthen defenses against cyberattacks. The adversarial training made GPT-5.6 significantly more robust.

cards.title: AI Coding Harness Goes Beyond Basic Search
cards.body: Developers are moving beyond grep to context-rich AI coding tools that understand code semantics. Modern AI harnesses improve code quality and developer productivity.

cards.title: AI in Healthcare: Prior Authorization Paradox
cards.body: AI could streamline healthcare's prior authorization process or make it more burdensome depending on implementation. The outcome will significantly impact patients and providers.
